name: Bank of The Ryukyus, Limited
summary: Bank of The Ryukyus, Limited provides various banking products and services in Japan. The company offers savings, time, and property deposits; loan products, including housing, apartment, car, education, card, and corporate loans, as well as loans for travel, moving and purchasing furniture, etc.; reverse mortgages; and insurance products, such as individual, lifetime, annuity, whole life, medical, term, fire, pet, and cancer insurance. It also engages in the intermediation of securities trading and handling of securities for sale; and provision of mutual funds, bonds, and foreign currency deposits. In addition, the company provides structured finance, mergers and acquisitions, business matching, local revitalization, and reorganization services, as well as business succession planning; cards; money transfer, safe deposit boxes; securities brokerage; foreign currency exchange; remittance; internet banking; and merchant services. Bank of The Ryukyus, Limited was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Naha, Japan.
